---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Pegfilgrastim 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Pegfilgrastim</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pegfilgrastim 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reduction in the duration of neutropenia and the incidence of febrile neutropenia in adult patients treated with cytotoxic chemotherapy for malignancy (with the exception of chronic myeloid leukaemia...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.9%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（99.7%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.2%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（98.0%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（97.7%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（96.8%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（96.4%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（96.3%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（96.3%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（95.6%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（95.6%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（95.6%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（95.6%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（95.6%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（93.6%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（92.3%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（91.9%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（91.9%）</li>
<li>pityriasis simplex（91.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
